svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="YHmLXvHFKfUhxkDQ4IP7" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="816" dy="706" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0089bf;" value="IPFS vs Onion：兩種不同的「去中心化」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="740" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipfsLabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0089bf;" value="IPFS — 解抗刪除問題" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="700" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipfsClient" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="瀏覽器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="60" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipfsGw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;" value="IPFS gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="220" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipfsDht" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;" value="DHT 查詢
「誰有 CID xxx?」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="400" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipfsPeer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0089bf;strokeColor=#003e57;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="持有 CID
的節點" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="600" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ia1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ipfsClient" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="ipfsGw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ia2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ipfsGw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="ipfsDht"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ia3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ipfsDht" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="ipfsPeer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipfsHide" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff5f5;strokeColor=#80d1ff;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=15;" value="✓ 內容竄改可被偵測（CID = hash）
✓ 任何節點都能 pin 提供，沒有單一可下架的點
✗ 客戶端 IP 對 gateway 與 peer 可見（無內建匿名）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="660" x="60" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onionLabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0089bf;" value="Onion — 解連線匿名問題" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="700" x="60" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onClient" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Tor Browser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="60" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onG" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;" value="Guard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="200" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onM" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;" value="Middle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="310" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;" value="Rendezvous
point" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="420" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onH" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;" value="HSDir
查詢" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="550" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0089bf;strokeColor=#003e57;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value=".onion
服務" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="660" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oa1" edge="1" parent="1" source="onClient" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="onG"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oa2" edge="1" parent="1" source="onG" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="onM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oa3" edge="1" parent="1" source="onM" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="onR"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oa4" edge="1" parent="1" source="onR" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="onH"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oa5" edge="1" parent="1" source="onH" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="onS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onionHide" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f4ff;strokeColor=#80d1ff;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=15;" value="✓ 客戶端 IP 對服務不可見
✓ 服務 IP 對客戶端不可見
✓ 不依賴 DNS（.onion 地址 = 公鑰 hash）
✗ 內容存活仰賴 Tor 網路與服務本身的維運" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="700" x="60" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

✓ 客戶端 IP 對服務不可見

✗ 內容存活仰賴 Tor 網路與服務本身的維運
